title: Reseed the existing empty planning-node descriptions
description:
Manually reseed the descriptions of the existing empty planning nodes so they match what the template now produces. This is a one-time manual data repair, not an engine feature.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] RESEED-01: the existing empty planning-node descriptions (`1eb0bdfd`, `2937919f`) are reseeded from their containers.
